project.name: MATISSE
project.fullName: Model-based engineering of Digital Twins for early verification and validation of Industrial Systems
project.programme: Co-funded by the European Union · Chips Joint Undertaking (Chips JU)
project.about:
MATISSE is a European Chips Joint Undertaking research project bringing together over 30 partners from 7 countries to develop an advanced framework for efficient engineering and validation of industrial systems using Digital Twins. It integrates digital-twin technology with model-based, data-driven, and cloud approaches to simulate, test, and predict system behaviour across industrial contexts.

This page collects the artifacts produced by the University of Innsbruck team as part of its contribution to MATISSE.
project.fundingNotice:
The project is supported by the Chips Joint Undertaking (Chips JU) and its members including top-up funding by Vinnova (SE), Österreichische Forschungsförderungsgesellschaft mbH (FFG) (AT), Business Finland (FI), Ministry of Universities and Research (IT), Fundação para a Ciência e a Tecnologia (PT), Tübitak (TR).

Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or the granting authority. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

artifacts.title: Twin2Clouds
artifacts.subtitle: Federated Cloud Placement Optimizer
artifacts.description: Framework for optimizing the placement of digital twin components across cloud environments. It supports decision-making based on layered cloud twin models and resource constraints.

artifacts.title: Cloud Deployer
artifacts.description: Toolchain that transforms digital twin models into deployable cloud infrastructure and deploys them on AWS.

artifacts.title: TwinRobust
artifacts.description: Framework for evaluating robustness of digital twins using simulation results and KPI-based analysis to assess system behavior.

artifacts.title: TwinMind
artifacts.subtitle: Modeling Copilot
artifacts.description: AI-assisted modeling tool that supports creation and refinement of digital twin models through model-based engineering workflows.

artifacts.title: SysML2CTM
artifacts.subtitle: SysML-to-CloudTwinModel Converter
artifacts.description: Converts SysML models into a cloud-oriented digital twin representation based on a layered cloud twin abstraction.

artifacts.title: CTM2AWS
artifacts.subtitle: CloudTwinModel-to-AWS
artifacts.description: Maps cloud digital twin models to AWS deployment infrastructure and instantiates cloud resources.

artifacts.title: SysML2SIM
artifacts.subtitle: SysML-to-Microgrid-Simulator Converter
artifacts.description: Generates simulation-ready inputs from SysML-based system models for execution in simulation environments.

artifacts.title: SimRunner
artifacts.subtitle: Microgrid Simulator Runner
artifacts.description: Executes simulation models and produces structured runtime results for further analysis.

artifacts.title: KPIRobust
artifacts.subtitle: Robustness KPI Evaluator
artifacts.description: Computes robustness and performance KPIs from simulation outputs to evaluate system quality and behavior.

artifacts.title: Cost and Pricing Primitive Model
artifacts.description: Defines foundational cost and pricing elements used for modeling resource consumption in cloud-based digital twins.

artifacts.title: Five-Layer Cloud Twin Model
artifacts.description: Provides a layered abstraction for structuring cloud digital twins across key functional domains such as data, processing, and management.

artifacts.title: DigitalTwinProfile for SysMLv1
artifacts.description: SysML v1 profile for modeling and structuring digital twin systems in a standardized way.

artifacts.title: DigitalTwinProfile for SysMLv2
artifacts.description: SysML v2 profile supporting next-generation digital twin modeling with improved semantics and structure.

artifacts.title: Control Strategy Model
artifacts.description: Represents system control logic used for simulation, analysis, and behavior specification.

artifacts.title: Environmental Condition Model
artifacts.description: Defines environmental factors and conditions that influence system behavior in simulations.

artifacts.title: Microgrid Simulator Input Model
artifacts.description: Defines structured inputs required for executing microgrid simulation scenarios.

artifacts.title: Simulation Result Model
artifacts.description: Captures and structures outputs generated from simulation execution for analysis.

artifacts.title: KPI Model
artifacts.description: Defines key performance indicators used to evaluate system performance and robustness.
